regional_pricing_notes: DigitalOcean publishes public serverless inference rates for DigitalOcean-hosted models on the Inference pricing page.
prompt_training_notes: DigitalOcean says customer data submitted to DigitalOcean-hosted models for inference is not used to train, retrain, or fine-tune models on the platform, and is not shared with third parties for training or fine-tuning.
